## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat — new feature or capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — restructuring without behavior change
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling, build scripts, dependency bumps
- [ ] ci — GitHub Actions, Dockerfile, supervisord, nginx config

## Affected Areas
- [ ] backend (Flask / Telegraf)
- [ ] frontend (Angular)
- [ ] database (CouchDB)
- [ ] docker / compose
- [ ] CI / GitHub Actions
- [ ] documentation only

## Related Scope / ADR

## Breaking Changes
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change — described below with migration steps

## Checklist
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing or behavioral change)
- [ ] README / OpenAPI updated (if API or UI surface changed)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed
